response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering and software craftsmanship skills, this role requires specific embedded systems expertise that is absent. Most critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is a stated requirement and not mentioned on the resume. Additionally, C language experience is limited to 6 months in 2014, whereas the role demands strong current C proficiency for UNIX embedded systems. The resume shows no background in security technologies (encryption, authentication, key exchange), networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP, MACsec, 802.1X), or embedded firmware development—all core to this position.
strengths: Proven ability to master diverse technology stacks and learn new domains across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship culture with TDD, CI/CD, and testing practices that align with quality-focused embedded development
Linux and DevOps infrastructure experience including Docker, CI servers, and development environment setup
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency despite being explicitly listed as a required qualification
Only 6 months of C/C++ experience from 2014; role requires strong current C proficiency for UNIX embedded development
No background in security technologies (encryption protocols, authentication systems, tamper detection) or embedded networking (NETCONF, SNMP, MACsec, 802.1X, switch operation)

key_factors.factor: Absence of security and networking domain expertise
